text: Narrator: Welcome to the Skeleton Story demonstration.
Narrator: This project shows Yarn Spinner features without narrative content.
Narrator: You are in the Main Area. This is the central hub.
Blue waves from across the room.
Narrator: Thanks for exploring the Skeleton Story!
You don't have the Crystal yet.
You don't have the Key yet.
You don't have the Scroll yet.
Blue: Hello! I'm Blue. I demonstrate basic dialogue patterns.
Blue: Each line appears one at a time.
Blue: The player advances by clicking or pressing continue.
Blue: You came back! That increases my trust level.
Blue: We're good friends now. Here, take this Crystal.
Blue: Oh, you already have it. Nevermind!
Blue: The Main Area is the hub. Everything connects here.
Blue: You can reach Secondary Area directly.
Blue: Tertiary Area needs the Key from Red.
Green: I'm Green. I demonstrate variables and conditionals.
Green: Let me show you how variables work.
Green: Your current trust with me is {0}.
Green: Now it's {0}. See how that works?
Green: Your trust with me is currently {0}.
Red: I'm Red. I show branching dialogue with consequences.
Red: I have the Key to Tertiary Area.
Red: But you'll need to earn it.
Red: Alright, a test of choices...
Red: Come back when you're ready.
Red: You already have the Key. Good luck in Tertiary Area!
Red: I'll ask three questions. Get them right to earn the Key.
Red: Question 1 - What demonstrates basic dialogue?
Red: Wrong. Blue demonstrates basic dialogue.
Red: Wrong. Blue demonstrates basic dialogue.
Red: Perfect score! Here's the Key.
Red: Close enough. Take the Key.
Red: Not quite. Try again later.
Purple: I'm Purple. I demonstrate saliency - smart line selection.
This is my first time meeting you.
You're one of my best friends now!
Purple: Watch how my greeting changes based on our relationship.
Purple: Line groups use the arrow-equals syntax.
Purple: Yarn Spinner picks the best matching line.
Purple: Lines with more specific conditions are preferred.
Purple: The saliency strategy in settings controls selection.
Purple: Visit me again to see my lines change!
Lime: I'm Lime. I demonstrate commands and functions.
Lime: The wait command pauses dialogue briefly.
Lime: Commands like emotion could control character expressions.
Lime: Or camera commands for visual effects.
Lime: Here's how commands integrate with variables:
Lime: I just used set to increase your trust.
Lime: High trust unlocked! Here's the Scroll.
Lime: Come back to learn more!
Narrator: You've entered the Secondary Area.
Narrator: This area demonstrates linear scene progression.
Narrator: You explore the Secondary Area.
Narrator: Step 1 - You notice the eastern path.
Narrator: Step 2 - The path leads to a clearing.
Narrator: Step 3 - In the clearing, you find Red waiting.
Narrator: You've entered the Tertiary Area.
Narrator: This area was locked until you obtained the Key.
Narrator: The Tertiary Area has hidden secrets.
Narrator: Your Crystal and Scroll resonate together!
Narrator: "True mastery comes from understanding all features."
Narrator: Something here responds to items you don't have yet.
Narrator: (Hint: Blue in Main Area has the Crystal)
Narrator: (Hint: Lime here has the Scroll, but needs trust)
Narrator: You've demonstrated all major Yarn Spinner features:
